mapper.sql: cid, title,text, type, uid, created, modified, readingcount, status
mapper.select: SELECT cn.*,ty.name,us.username FROM contents cn,types ty,users us WHERE cn.type=ty.mid AND cn.uid=us.uid ORDER BY created DESC
SELECT cn.*,ty.name,us.username FROM contents cn,types ty,users us WHERE cn.type=ty.mid AND cn.uid=us.uid and cn.uid=#{uid} ORDER BY created DESC
select c.*,u.username,t.name from contents c,users u,types t where cid=#{cid} and c.uid=u.uid and c.type=t.mid
SELECT cn.*,ty.name,us.username FROM contents cn,types ty,users us WHERE cn.type=ty.mid AND cn.uid=us.uid and cn.status='1' ORDER BY created DESC
SELECT * FROM contents WHERE cid < (SELECT cid FROM contents WHERE cid = #{cid}) ORDER BY cid DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT * FROM contents WHERE cid > (SELECT cid FROM contents WHERE cid = #{cid}) ORDER BY cid ASC LIMIT 1;
select c.*,u.username,t.name from contents c,users u,types t where c.type=#{mid} and c.uid=u.uid and c.type=t.mid ORDER BY created DESC
select c.*,u.username,t.name from contents c,users u,types t where c.uid=#{uid} and c.uid=u.uid and c.type=t.mid ORDER BY created DESC
SELECT cn.*,ty.name,us.username FROM contents cn,types ty,users us WHERE cn.type=ty.mid AND cn.uid=us.uid and cn.status='1' ORDER BY created DESC
